name: @astrotracker/renderer
description: AstroTracker React UI — independent workspace member; talks to main only via typed IPC. Built/served by electron-vite from the desktop package; @astrotracker/desktop is a type-only devDependency (IPC contract types, erased at build).

scripts.lint: eslint src vitest.config.ts && prettier --check src vitest.config.ts index.html
